summary: ITERATION 4 FEATURES FULLY FUNCTIONAL - Smart AI intent detection and inline text input (replacing expo-audio) working perfectly. Backend smart intent analysis correctly identifies create vs update vs mixed intents. Frontend mic button expands to inline text input with example chips. ExtractionResultModal shows task updates with green 'Marked as done' badges and orange 'Moved to' badges. All backend APIs tested (9/9 passed). All frontend features verified via Playwright. Integration between frontend and backend confirmed.

react_native_issues.issue: Deprecated shadow* style props used instead of boxShadow
react_native_issues.details: React Native Web shows warnings: 'shadow*' style props are deprecated. Use 'boxShadow'. Same issue from previous iterations.
react_native_issues.impact: Non-breaking deprecation warning. Will need migration in future SDK versions.

react_native_issues.details: Console warning about deprecated pointerEvents prop usage.

critical_code_review_comments: ✓ Backend: Smart intent detection working perfectly (analyze_input_intent function)
✓ Backend: POST /api/process-input returns intent, created_tasks, updated_tasks fields
✓ Backend: Intent=create for new task text (tested)
✓ Backend: Intent=update for completion text with status=completed (tested)
✓ Backend: Intent=update for deadline change with new due_date (tested)
✓ Backend: Intent=mixed for combined create+update text (tested)
✓ Backend: Multiple task completions work (tested)
✓ Backend: Priority change via text works (tested)
✓ Backend: Task updates persist in database (verified with GET after update)
✓ Backend: Backward compatibility maintained ('tasks' field still present)
✓ Frontend: VoiceRecorder.tsx completely rewritten - no expo-audio dependency
✓ Frontend: Mic button (testID='voice-record-button') expands to inline text input
✓ Frontend: Expanded view shows title 'What do you need to do?'
✓ Frontend: Expanded view shows subtitle 'Say it naturally — create tasks, mark done, change deadlines'
✓ Frontend: TextInput (testID='voice-text-input') for text entry
✓ Frontend: Example chips present: 'Mark done', 'Change date', 'New task'
✓ Frontend: Cancel button (testID='cancel-voice-input') collapses back to mic
✓ Frontend: Send to Lamdi button (testID='send-voice-input') processes text
✓ Frontend: ExtractionResultModal shows 'Tasks Updated' title for updates
✓ Frontend: ExtractionResultModal shows green 'Marked as done' badges for completions
✓ Frontend: ExtractionResultModal shows orange 'Moved to [date]' badges for deadline changes
✓ Frontend: ExtractionResultModal shows both created and updated tasks for mixed intent
✓ Frontend: taskStore.ts handles created_tasks and updated_tasks from response
✓ Frontend: Task list updates in real-time after AI processing
✓ Frontend: Completed tasks show strikethrough in task list
✓ Integration: End-to-end create task → mark as done via text input works
✓ Integration: End-to-end create task → change deadline via text input works
✓ Integration: Mixed intent (completion + new task) works end-to-end
⚠ Frontend: Deprecated shadow* props warning persists (same as iteration 1, 2, 3, non-breaking)
⚠ Frontend: Deprecated pointerEvents prop warning (non-breaking)
seed_data_creation: Test tasks created during testing: 'TEST_ITERATION4: Buy groceries', 'TEST_ITERATION4: Call supplier Nguyen', 'TEST_ITERATION4: Review accounting reports', 'TEST_ITERATION4: Call the bank'. All test data cleaned up via pytest fixtures.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 4 features (smart AI intent detection + inline text input replacing expo-audio) fully tested and working. Backend smart intent analysis correctly identifies create/update/mixed intents. Frontend mic button expands to inline text input with example chips. ExtractionResultModal shows task updates with colored badges. Integration verified end-to-end. Previous iteration issues (deprecated shadow props, pointerEvents) still present but non-breaking. No new bugs found.

test_categories.smart_intent_detection: 8 tests (create, update completion, update deadline, mixed, multiple completions, priority change, response structure, database persistence)

test_categories.mic_button_expansion: Mic button expands to inline text input
test_categories.expanded_view_elements: Title, subtitle, text input, example chips, Cancel, Send buttons
test_categories.cancel_button_functionality: Cancel button collapses back to mic
test_categories.create_new_task: Text input creates new task via AI
test_categories.mark_task_done: Completion text marks task as done (smart intent detection)
test_categories.change_deadline: Deadline change text updates task due_date

features_tested: Backend analyze_input_intent function analyzes user text
Backend fetches existing pending tasks for context
Backend uses GPT-4o to determine intent (create, update, mixed)
Intent=create: Returns created_tasks array with new tasks
Intent=update: Returns updated_tasks array with task_id, changes, reason
Intent=mixed: Returns both created_tasks and updated_tasks
Completion text (e.g., 'I finished calling supplier') → status=completed
Deadline change text (e.g., 'Move accounting to Friday') → new due_date
Priority change text (e.g., 'Make reports urgent') → new priority
Multiple completions work (e.g., 'Done with calling and checking')
Task updates persist in database (verified with GET)
Backward compatibility: 'tasks' field still present in response

backend_integration.response_structure: ✓ Returns intent, created_tasks, updated_tasks, raw_interpretation, language_detected, confidence

frontend_integration.taskStore: ✓ Handles created_tasks and updated_tasks (lines 92-129 in taskStore.ts)
frontend_integration.modal_display: ✓ ExtractionResultModal shows updates with badges (lines 88-116 in ExtractionResultModal.tsx)
frontend_integration.real_time_updates: ✓ Task list updates immediately after AI processing

features_tested: Mic button (testID='voice-record-button') expands to inline text input
Expanded view shows title 'What do you need to do?'
Expanded view shows subtitle 'Say it naturally — create tasks, mark done, change deadlines'
TextInput (testID='voice-text-input') for text entry
Example chips: 'Mark done', 'Change date', 'New task'
Example chips are clickable and fill text input
Cancel button (testID='cancel-voice-input') collapses back to mic
Send to Lamdi button (testID='send-voice-input') processes text
Send button disabled when text is empty
Processing state shows 'Lamdi is thinking...' with spinner
No expo-audio dependency (completely removed)

frontend_implementation.state_management: ✓ Uses useState for text and expanded state
frontend_implementation.ui_elements: ✓ All UI elements present with correct testIDs
frontend_implementation.example_chips: ✓ Three example chips with onPress handlers (lines 90-98)

features_tested: Modal title changes based on intent: 'Tasks Created', 'Tasks Updated', 'Tasks Processed'
Stats row shows Created count and Updated count separately
Task updates section shows green 'Marked as done' badges for completions
Task updates section shows orange 'Moved to [date]' badges for deadline changes
Task updates section shows 'Priority → [priority]' badges for priority changes
Update items show task title, changes, and reason
Created tasks section shows new tasks with priority, category, due_date
Footer message changes: 'Lamdi matched your message to existing tasks!' for updates
Done button (testID='extraction-done-button') closes modal

frontend_implementation.modal_title_logic: ✓ Title changes based on intent (lines 46-48 in ExtractionResultModal.tsx)
frontend_implementation.change_badges: ✓ Green for completion, orange for deadline, green for priority (lines 95-112)

regression_testing.existing_features: ✓ All existing features still working (task CRUD, stats, filters, reminders)

design_review.color_contrast: ✓ Good contrast between text and backgrounds
design_review.inline_text_input_design: ✓ Clear visual hierarchy with title, subtitle, text input, example chips, buttons
design_review.example_chips: ✓ Visually distinct with orange background (#FAEFEA) and orange text (#D48C70)
design_review.send_button: ✓ Clear disabled state (gray background when text is empty)
design_review.modal_badges: ✓ Color-coded badges: green for completion, orange for deadline changes

tested_scenarios: New task creation: 'Buy groceries tomorrow, urgent' → intent=create
Task completion: 'I finished calling supplier' → intent=update, status=completed
Deadline change: 'Move accounting to Friday' → intent=update, due_date changed
Priority change: 'Make reports urgent' → intent=update, priority=urgent
Mixed intent: 'Done with bank. Buy milk tomorrow' → intent=mixed, both arrays populated
Multiple completions: 'Done with calling and checking' → intent=update, 2 tasks updated
gpt_4o_intent_analysis.ai_accuracy: High - AI correctly matched tasks by meaning, not exact words

steps: 5. Modal shows 'Tasks Created' with new task
5. AI matches to existing task (smart intent detection)
6. Modal shows 'Tasks Updated' with green 'Marked as done' badge
7. Task shows strikethrough in task list
1. Create task: 'Review accounting reports next Monday'
3. Enter text: 'Move accounting review to Friday'
5. AI matches to existing task and extracts new date
6. Modal shows 'Tasks Updated' with orange 'Moved to 2026-04-17' badge
7. Task due_date updated in task list
3. Enter text: 'I finished calling the bank. Now I need to buy milk tomorrow.'
5. AI detects mixed intent (completion + new task)
6. Modal shows 'Tasks Processed' with both update and create
7. Bank task shows strikethrough, milk task appears in list
